allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json nb = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for cell in nb[''cells'']: if ''source'' in cell and isinstance\(cell[''source''], list\): for i, line in enumerate\(cell[''source'']\): if ''!python practice/main.py'' in line: cell[''source''][i] = line.replace\(''!python practice/main.py'', ''!python -m practice.main''\) elif ''!$PYTHON -m practice.main'' in line: cell[''source''][i] = line.replace\(''!$PYTHON -m practice.main'', ''!python -m practice.main''\) print\(json.dumps\(nb, indent=1\)\) ")
